complaint: Sometimes when I turn the key the engine cranks but takes forever to catch, and twice it almost died pulling away, I'm scared it will leave me stranded.
observations: Extended crank when hot, normal start when cold
Fuel rail pressure bleeds down after shutoff, leak-down at injector
Long-term fuel trim slightly rich, no spark issues
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'fuel injector'.
